title: ononis viscosa var. clausonis
intro: Ononis viscosa var. clausonis, also known as sticky restharrow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, sticky restharrow has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its alkaloid and glycoside compounds. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, sticky restharrow is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although its use should be under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to potential interactions and side effects.
